sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114888" key="xruso/kokkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσό-κοκκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114888.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with golden seeds</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grains,</tr_> Ps.-<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apul.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Herb.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
